pi_items.source: Verified via setup_task.sh which explicitly downloads and saves the target file to this path.

Verified by inspecting the download URL in setup_task.sh, which pulls 'raster/landsat.tif' from 'raw.githubusercontent.com/opengeos/data/main'. Rasterio inspection confirms it is a 4-band GeoTIFF image consistent with Landsat data.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real Landsat satellite imagery. The target data file is confirmed to be downloaded from the opengeos/data GitHub repository (raster/landsat.tif) and stored at /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif.
